markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration for GrowthX's new AI-focused marketing publication and content creation process.](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX seeks a writer/editor for their upcoming AI marketing publication, focusing on first-hand experiences and transparent insights](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [Jesse Klein has relevant experience in tech journalism, content marketing, and ghostwriting, making her a potential fit for the role](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Collaboration would involve working closely with domain experts, with an hourly rate of $100-$120 for ghostwriting technical content](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Initial content creation process estimated at 5-6 hours per 1500-2000 word article, with efficiency expected to improve over time](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Publication Vision

  - [Modern growth agency launching an AI-focused marketing publication](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
  - [Content to cover AI adoption in marketing, aiming for transparency and first-hand experiences](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Target audience: knowledge workers seeking to advance their work processes](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Publication tone: useful resource, no ego, no product shilling](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)

### Jesse Klein's Background and Expertise

  - [Current full-time journalism job with growing focus on AI and tech reporting](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Previous experience:](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
      - [Content marketing at tech startups (including Carta)](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
      - [Running a guest column at Green Biz](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [Ghostwriting and editing for various publications and companies](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Pairing writer with domain expert (e.g., senior marketing leader)](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Options for collaboration:](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
    1.  Domain expert provides thoughts, writer structures and creates content
    2.  30-minute call to outline topic, writer drafts, expert reviews and provides feedback
  - [Access to experts via Slack for ongoing communication and clarification](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)

### Project Scope and Expectations

  - [Article length: 1,500 to 2,000 words](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Estimated time per article: 5-6 hours initially (1hr interview, 1-2hrs research/structuring, 2-3hrs writing)](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Timeframe: 1-3 weeks per article, depending on other commitments](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Expectation of improved efficiency as familiarity with topics increases](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Compensation and Work Arrangement

  - [Hourly rate: $100-$120 for ghostwriting technical content](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Work to be conducted through Slack for easy communication](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Jesse to remain anonymous (ghostwriter) due to full-time journalism commitments](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jesse to send samples of relevant writing work](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Jason to invite Jesse to a Slack channel for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Jason to determine the first article topic for Jesse to work on](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Begin trial collaboration to assess fit and refine the process](https://fathom.video/share/ycH5QCrUSdYsADqcpt2js-p1EJ8bCGdt?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
